features: Rustic Vintage-Style Design: This handmade flower vase was designed to recreate the allure and elegance of found artifacts. Cast of solid and unique materials and composites that give this piece its uniqueness, the realistic reproduction faithfully captures the sculptural form and heavily aged look of an antique vessel

High Quality Cement Vase: This verdigris cement vases for flowers features intricate detailing and a rich, earthy texture. Our vintage vase is crafted from high quality terracotta, with a flat non-slip bottom, durable design, wide mouth opening, matte antique texture and a warm, natural tone that complements both traditional and modern decor styles

Ideal Sized Decorative Vase : Available in two sizes, choose between medium and large to find the perfect fit for your space or pair them for a striking display. Standing 5.9" tall this medium pot is 6.3" wide, with a 4.7" mouth and 9.1" tall the large vase is 4.3" wide, with a 5.5" mouth. Ideal for showcasing dried flowers or as a standalone piece that making it the perfect centerpiece vase or accent for your home decor

Enjoy DIY Flower Arrangements: Rustic flower vase is suitable for DIY flower arrangements, natural pampas grass, palm leaves, eucalyptus, dandelions, reeds, cattails and other green plants, cherry blossoms, flower stems, dried flowers, fresh flowers, botanical artificial flowers, fake flowers, feathers, etc. Elevate your home with our textured planter for flowers, adding character and sophistication to any room

Versatile Vases Home Ornaments: Classic, traditional, farmhouse , these terracotta vase fit any style. Give your flowers a beautiful display, the ceramic vase decoration looks beautiful and stylish, suitable for living room entrance decoration, kitchen decoration, dining room, bedroom, office, courtyard, it will be an eye-catching decoration wherever you want to place it
description: Beautiful Large Vintage Style Clay Planter The Beauty Of The Arborus Cement Vase Is In Its Etched Surface. Smooth On The Inside And Pleasingly Textured On The Outside. The White Surface Is Made More Interesting With The Scratched Finishing Technique To Add Some Texture To Your Favorite Blooms. Style With Dried Foliage And Florals Or As A Decorative Sculptural Vessel. Standing 9.06/5.91 inches tall, this round, narrow-bottom vase features a 5.51/4.53inch sturdy base and a wide 4.33/4.72inch opening with a slightly inward-curved rim, offering both stability and a distinctive silhouette. Whether placed on a living room or dining table, shelf, or entryway console, it serves as a statement piece that adds warmth and character to your living space. Crafted from high-quality cement, our rustic ceramic vase is lightweight yet durable, ensuring it can withstand daily use while maintaining its aesthetic appeal. With its aged and ancient look, the Vase adds a touch of history and sophistication to any room. Simple farmhouse vintage design can be casually matched with any style to meet all your decorating needs.Whether adorning your home, wedding venue, or office space, this versatile and sophisticated vase promises to elevate any setting with its understated beauty. Join us in the journey of transforming the old into something beautifully new.
